---
title: "Sources and record of changes"
---

{{< include ../_includes/sprfmo-banner.qmd >}}

<div class="paper-title">Sources, Review Status, and Record of Changes</div>

## Sources used to create this site

| Source | Exact saved version used | Material used here |
|---|---|---|
| `SPRFMO/jmMSE` | `94d4d325ba46220f56097b3de90824c83b7cf3cd` | Primary source: MP29/MP32 controls, robustness selection, HCR implementation, and July presentation |
| `SPRFMO/scw17` | `0eb97c9c0329f5ec3338e3cf885f6e1f184c4780` | Secondary source: Papers 03, 04, 08, and 09 plus Quarto conventions |

The current registry derives from `jmMSE`, not the SCW17 test table. It does not
assert that MP29 or MP32 has been formally recommended or adopted.

## Information that must accompany each CMP

Every CMP version must link to:

- the method used to calculate its indicator, harvest control rule, and catch allocation;
- all parameter values and annual data requirements;
- the exact saved version of `jmMSE` used for evaluation;
- OM and robustness scenario definitions;
- definitions of the performance measures and links to the saved results;
- review findings and known limitations; and
- the decision that changed its status.

## Types of change

| Class | Examples | Required review |
|---|---|---|
| Wording only | Spelling, navigation, or clearer background explanation | Documentation review |
| Same calculation, revised code | Software change shown to give the same answers | Code review plus a repeat-calculation test |
| Scientific | Parameter, index, window, HCR, constraint, allocation, or fallback change | Renewed scientific review and normally MSE evaluation |
| Status | Test to shortlist, recommendation, adoption, or retirement | Cited decision record |

## Work still needed

- Confirm the formal working-group status and stable identifiers for MP29 and
  MP32.
- Reconcile the 100-iteration MP29/MP32 tuned triggers with the 500-iteration
  MP41/MP42 sensitivity values before approving a final version.
- Add the saved results from the agreed `jmMSE` runs.
- Complete the required units, annual cutoffs, missing-data rules, rounding, and
  exceptional-circumstances provisions.
- Add saved worked examples and automatic repeat-calculation checks.
